content: Arjun stole our ancestral land. The original deed from 2005 clearly names me as co-owner. He forged documents in 2018 to remove my name. I confronted him at the temple gate on October 15th around 8:30 PM — I saw him arguing with a man in a white coat, but I didn’t recognize him. I left because I didn’t want to escalate. I didn’t kill him. I was home alone all night. I didn’t know about the money transfer. I have no access to his phone or bank account. I only want my share of the property back. The police are ignoring my documents. Why is Vikram’s forged deed being accepted?
